samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Design a frequency divider that divides the input clock frequency of 100MHz into 50MHz, 10MHz, and 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</param>
        <param id="RST">Reset signal.</param>
        <param id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</param>
        <param id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</param>
        <param id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</param>
    </param_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt_50" width_description="[0:0]">Counter for CLK_50.</reg>
            <reg id="cnt_10" width_description="[0:0]">Counter for CLK_10.</reg>
            <reg id="cnt_100" width_description="[0:0]">Counter for CLK_100.</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <if>
                <condition>CLK_in or RST</condition>
                <true>Reset the counter.</true>
                <false>Increment the counter.</false>
            </if>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
